title: zoxy configuration
description: Static zoxy proxy configuration, parsed once at startup.

$schema.description: JSON Schema URL for editor completion; ignored by zoxy.

listen.description: IPv4 address the proxy accepts connections on.

admin.description: IPv4 address of the admin/metrics endpoint; null disables it.

handoff.description: Unix-socket path for hot-restart listener handoff; null disables it.

accept_mode.description: How accepted connections spread across workers.

x-enumDescriptions.reuseport: One SO_REUSEPORT listener per worker; the kernel hashes.
x-enumDescriptions.shared: One listener; every worker holds a pending accept.

workers.description: Fixed worker count; null uses one worker per online CPU (capped).

tls.description: TLS termination on the listener; null = plaintext.

anyOf.description: TLS termination identity and options for the listener.

certificate_file.description: Path to the PEM certificate (chain) for the default identity.

private_key_file.description: Path to the PEM private key for the default identity.

kernel_offload.description: Hand completed handshakes to kernel TLS; off forces the userspace relay.

http2.description: Offer HTTP/2 in ALPN; h2-negotiating clients use the HTTP/2 data path.

additional_identities.description: Extra SNI-selected server identities beyond the default certificate.

items.description: An additional TLS identity, selected when the client's SNI matches.

server_names.description: SNI names this identity serves (exact, or single-label "*." wildcards).

certificate_file.description: Path to this identity's PEM certificate (chain).

private_key_file.description: Path to this identity's PEM private key.

items.description: A routing rule: match a host and path prefix, forward to a cluster.

host.description: Host to match; "*" matches any Host header.

path_prefix.description: Prefix matched against the request target; "/" matches everything.

cluster.description: Name of the cluster to route matching requests to.

items.description: An upstream cluster: endpoints plus optional resilience policy.

name.description: Unique cluster name referenced by routes.

endpoints.description: Upstream endpoint addresses: IPv4 host:port, IPv6 [host]:port, or hostname:port. Hostnames resolve once at startup (and again on SIGHUP reload); every resolved address becomes its own endpoint.

tls.description: Re-encrypt traffic to this cluster's endpoints; null = plaintext.

anyOf.description: Upstream re-encryption for a cluster; pick a verification posture explicitly.

server_name.description: Certificate hostname to require and offer as SNI; required unless insecure.

ca_file.description: PEM trust-store bundle path; required unless insecure.

insecure.description: Skip upstream verification; mutually exclusive with server_name/ca_file.

x-enumDescriptions.maglev: Maglev consistent hashing (see hash); falls back to least-request.

hash.description: What the consistent hash keys on (maglev only).

x-enumDescriptions.header: Hash a named request header (see header).

header.description: Header name to hash on when hash = header.

retry.description: Retry policy for failed attempts; absent = retries off.

anyOf.description: Retry policy: bounded attempts with jittered exponential backoff and a budget.

max.description: Retry attempts after the first try.

backoff_base_ms.description: Base backoff before the first retry (jittered exponential).

backoff_cap_ms.description: Maximum backoff between retries (must be >= backoff_base_ms).

budget_percent.description: Retry budget as a percent of active requests.

budget_min.description: Minimum concurrent retries allowed regardless of the budget percent.

max_connections.description: Max concurrent upstream connections per worker.

max_pending.description: Max requests queued awaiting a connection per worker.

max_requests.description: Max concurrent upstream requests per worker.

anyOf.description: Passive outlier detection: eject endpoints that fail repeatedly.

consecutive_failures.description: Consecutive attempt failures before an endpoint is ejected.

ejection_ms.description: How long an ejected endpoint stays out.

max_ejection_percent.description: Ceiling on the ejected share of a cluster.

health_check.description: Active TCP health probes; absent = off.

anyOf.description: Active TCP health probing for a cluster's endpoints.

healthy_threshold.description: Consecutive successes to mark an endpoint healthy.

unhealthy_threshold.description: Consecutive failures to mark an endpoint unhealthy.

per_try_timeout_ms.description: Deadline per upstream attempt (connect to first byte); 0 = disabled.
